name: Zipper
description: Rows of rounded teeth meshing from alternate sides — the zip opens and closes a little differently on every redraw.

code.style: --toothA: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --zw: @rand(42%, 80%); --rule: ( --zg: @r(0, 9); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: calc(16% + @var(--zg) * 1%); width: var(--zw); height: calc(68% - @var(--zg) * 2%); background: var(--toothA); border-radius: 0 26% 26% 0; transition: ease 600ms; } } @match(y % 2 == 0) { :after { left: auto; right: 0; border-radius: 26% 0 0 26%; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
